Uses of Class
knowledge_keepers.KnowledgeKeepers

Packages that use KnowledgeKeepers
Package
Description
game
 
knowledge_keepers
 
shot_boxes

shot_boxes.questions
 

  • Uses of KnowledgeKeepers in game

    Methods in game with parameters of type KnowledgeKeepers
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Game.addKeeper(KnowledgeKeepers keeper)
    Adds a KnowledgeKeeper to the game.
    void
    Game.checkInteraction(KnowledgeKeepers keeper, ShotBoxes shotBox)
    Checks for interaction between player and shot boxes, updates score and health, and handles level progression.

  • Uses of KnowledgeKeepers in knowledge_keepers

    Subclasses of KnowledgeKeepers in knowledge_keepers
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Professor
    Represents a Professor entity in the game, extending KnowledgeKeepers.
    class 
    SL
    Represents a Section Leader (SL) entity in the game, extending KnowledgeKeepers.
    class 
    TA
    Represents a Teaching Assistant (TA) entity in the game, extending KnowledgeKeepers.
    Methods in knowledge_keepers that return types with arguments of type KnowledgeKeepers
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<KnowledgeKeepers>
    KnowledgeKeepers.getProfessors()
    Returns the list of all Professor instances.
    static List<KnowledgeKeepers>
    KnowledgeKeepers.getSLs()
    Returns the list of all SL instances.
    static List<KnowledgeKeepers>
    KnowledgeKeepers.getTAs()
    Returns the list of all TA instances.

  • Uses of KnowledgeKeepers in shot_boxes

    Methods in shot_boxes with parameters of type KnowledgeKeepers
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ShotBoxes.interact(KnowledgeKeepers k)
    Defines the interaction behavior when the player collides with this object.
    void
    ShotBoxes.move(KnowledgeKeepers k, int X)
    Starts the downward movement of the informational item from a given X position.

  • Uses of KnowledgeKeepers in shot_boxes.informations

    Methods in shot_boxes.informations with parameters of type KnowledgeKeepers
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Informations.interact(KnowledgeKeepers k)
    Handles interaction with the information box.
    void
    EasyInformations.move(KnowledgeKeepers k, int X)
    Initiates the downward movement of the information box from the given X-coordinate.
    void
    HardInformations.move(KnowledgeKeepers k, int X)
    Starts the vertical movement of the information box from the specified horizontal position.
    void
    MidInformations.move(KnowledgeKeepers k, int X)
    Begins the downward movement of the information box from the specified X-coordinate.

  • Uses of KnowledgeKeepers in shot_boxes.questions

    Methods in shot_boxes.questions with parameters of type KnowledgeKeepers
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Questions.interact(KnowledgeKeepers k)
    Handles the logic when a player interacts with this question.
    void
    EasyQuestions.move(KnowledgeKeepers k, int X)
    Starts the downward movement of the question box from the specified horizontal position.
    void
    HardQuestions.move(KnowledgeKeepers k, int X)
    Initiates the downward movement of the question box from the specified horizontal position.
    void
    MidQuestions.move(KnowledgeKeepers k, int X)
    Starts the downward movement of the question box from a given horizontal position.
